commercialRule: Inventra installers show the desktop shortcut option while preserving app data during upgrades.
releaseNotes: Locked the installer to assisted NSIS mode so the desktop shortcut checkbox/option is available.
Desktop shortcut is enabled as a real option, not forced with always.
Start Menu shortcut remains enabled so the app can always be found.
No SQL, app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater backend logic changed.
